title: uragoga helferiana
side_effects: Uragoga helferiana can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and stomach pain due to its high toxicity levels. Prolonged consumption of the plant can lead to kidney and liver damage, as well as an increased risk of bleeding and bruising. In severe cases, improper use of Uragoga helferiana can cause seizures, coma, and even death. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using the plant for any health benefits.
